by_failure_reason.label: Out of Stock
by_failure_reason.desc: Seller's available inventory was below buyer's needs even for partial.
by_failure_reason.fix: Add real-time stock sync; offer pre-order for established sellers.

by_failure_reason.label: MOQ Not Met
by_failure_reason.desc: Buyer quantity was too far below seller MOQ for a waiver.
by_failure_reason.fix: Enable order pooling; lower MOQ threshold for first-time buyers.

by_failure_reason.label: Price Too High
by_failure_reason.desc: Seller's floor price exceeds buyer's maximum budget — no ZOPA exists.
by_failure_reason.fix: Show buyers what budget unlocks more sellers; surface lower-grade alternatives.

by_failure_reason.label: Session Timeout
by_failure_reason.fix: Increase timeout for agricultural equipment and high-value categories.
